reason: Successfully executed all steps to verify the agent can use the GitHub tool to retrieve the authenticated user's GitHub username after granting access.
steps: 1. Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agent list.
2. Found "QA-20260414-202015-m9vv" agent in sidebar and clicked it - Agent detail page opened showing the agent in idle status.
3. Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Agent status was "idle", which satisfies the requirement.

4. Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message was typed into input field and sent successfully. A new session "GitHub Identity Verification Check" was created.
5. GitHub account access request card appeared - Card appeared asking "Allow access to GitHub to retrieve your username?" with GitHub already connected and checked. Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button.
6. API request review dialog appeared - Dialog appeared asking to allow "GET /user" API request. Selected "Allow Once" to grant the request.
7. Waited up to 4 minutes for response - Agent completed processing in 44 seconds and returned the response: "Your GitHub username is yiw190."

8. Verified response includes GitHub username and took screenshot - Response clearly displays the GitHub username "yiw190" in bold text. Screenshot saved as github-username-response.png showing the complete conversation.
